name: f-tune-pro
description: Advanced Performance Engineering Suite for macOS and Windows
author: MrBeoHP

scripts.build:log: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (!(Test-Path 'dist')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'dist' | Out-Null }; $log=\"dist/build.log\"; npm run build 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath $log; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host ('BUILD_LOG_PATH='+$log); if ($code -ne 0) { exit $code }; Start-Process notepad.exe $log"
scripts.dist: npm run build && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'dist\*.exe' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { if (Test-Path 'upx.exe') { .\upx.exe --ultra-brute --lzma $_.FullName } }"
